CHECKPOINT_MGMT_HOST.description: Check Point on-premises management DNS name or IP

CHECKPOINT_MGMT_URL.description: Optional Smart-1 Cloud management URL (for example, https://cloudinfra-gw-us.portal.checkpoint.com/your-tenant-id/web_api)

CHECKPOINT_API_KEY.description: Check Point management API key. Required for Smart-1 Cloud; optional for on-premises where setup can fall back to username/password

CHECKPOINT_DOC_CLIENT_ID.description: Client ID for the Check Point documentation MCP

CHECKPOINT_DOC_SECRET_KEY.description: Secret key for the Check Point documentation MCP

CHECKPOINT_REPUTATION_SERVICE_API_KEY.description: Optional API key for the Check Point Reputation Service MCP. If omitted, the MCP stays disabled.

CHECKPOINT_THREAT_EMULATION_API_KEY.description: Optional API key for the Check Point Threat Emulation MCP. If omitted, the MCP stays disabled.

OPENCODE_SERVER_USERNAME.description: Username for OpenCode web mode (defaults to opencode if left blank during setup)

OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD.description: Password for OpenCode web mode (defaults to blank if left blank during setup, which disables auth)
